codeReview.summary: Fix commit adequately addresses the prior blocking unread-count defect by deduplicating unread notifications by ID and reconciling SSE items against API IDs; search endpoint usage is now aligned with feature contract (`/api/notifications?search=`). No new blocking correctness issues were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-level AGENTS guidance says backend/API files are out of scope for this TUI mission, but this feature/fix required backend edits to satisfy Notification Center behavior and search contract.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md lists `src/api/admin.ts` and `src/gateway/` under DO NOT TOUCH; reviewed commits for f-notification-center (including a743a0a) modify `src/api/admin.ts` and earlier implementation modified `src/gateway/notification-store.ts`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature references skill `worker`, but no corresponding skill file exists in repository skills, causing procedural drift noted by worker.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json for `f-notification-center` sets `skillName` to `worker`; `/Users/teodorwaltervido/Desktop/service/.factory/skills` is empty; handoff `skillFeedback` records `Skill worker not found`.

summary: Pass. The fix resolves the prior blocking overcount/reconciliation issue in unread-count computation and aligns search endpoint usage. No blocking issues remain in this fix review.
